falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (a 10% increase from its 2024 August low) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this level would contradict the bottom pattern and indicate a bullish trend, invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 (current score: 41) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would signal extreme overbought conditions, refuting the current pattern's validity as a bottom formation.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis-point rate cut within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such an intervention would inject liquidity and disrupt the expected bearish dynamics, directly contradicting the HOLD signal's assumption of continuation.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
